Rule.InvariantScript: If(And('Tela Funcionario'.Size = ScreenSize.Small, Or(newMode, editMode, itemSelected)), 0, 3)

Rules.InvariantScript: If(And('Tela Funcionario'.Size = ScreenSize.Small, Or(newMode, editMode, itemSelected)), false, true)
If(Or(deleteMode, And('Tela Funcionario'.Size = ScreenSize.Small, !newMode, !editMode, !itemSelected)), false, true)
ResetForm(Form2); UpdateContext({ editMode: false, newMode: false });
UpdateContext({ deleteMode: true, deleteCancelled: false, selectedRecord: RecordsGallery2.Selected })
UpdateContext({ CurrentItem: Self.LastSubmit, editMode: false, newMode: false })
Notify("Não é possível salvar. Verifique se há erros no formulário.", NotificationType.Error)
"Tem certeza de que deseja excluir este registro?"

Remove([@Funcionario], selectedRecord); If(IsEmpty(Errors([@Funcionario], selectedRecord)), UpdateContext( { CurrentItem: First([@Funcionario]), itemSelected: false, editMode: false, newMode: false, deleteMode: false }));
